title: Content Security Policy (CSP) Bypass
proof: POST to /vulnerabilities/csp/ with include=<script>alert(1)</script> reflected the script into a <script src='...'> tag: '<script src='<script>alert(1)</script>'></script>'. CSP header: 'Content-Security-Policy: script-src 'self' https://pastebin.com example.com code.jquery.com https://ssl.google-analytics.com'. The CSP whitelists external domains that allow hosted script injection (e.g., pastebin.com, code.jquery.com).
poc_steps: Alternatively, host payload on pastebin.com or another whitelisted CDN
CSP only restricts to whitelisted domains; does not prevent injection via those domains
